title: Ollama
summary: The official Ollama project that lets you run large language models locally with a simple CLI and REST API.
highlights: run Llama 3, Phi 3, Mistral, Gemma and other models locally

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, available on npm as 'ollama'.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, published on PyPI as 'ollama'.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, available on PyPI inside langchain-community.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama with file uploads, markdown, dark mode and role management.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters, available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API.

title: ollamajs
summary: Lightweight npm package providing Node.js bindings for Ollama.

title: ollama-copilots
summary: VS Code extension that brings local AI copilots powered by Ollama models into the editor.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app template that connects to a local Ollama server via ollama-js.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration allowing Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Official example Discord bot that streams answers from local Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI for managing Ollama models and prompts with TUI dashboards.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# / .NET client for Ollama, published as ‘OllamaSharp’ on NuGet.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds AI autocomplete, summarization and Q&A using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI/CD pipelines that need to spin up Ollama services with pre-pulled models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Starter repo showing how to build a local RAG stack using Ollama, LangChain and Chroma.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI wrapper that exposes additional authentication, rate-limiting and model routing on top of Ollama.

title: ollama-macos-swift
summary: Swift Package Manager library for integrating Ollama into macOS/iOS apps.
